name: Advance America
description_short: Brandon, FL's Advance America storefront at 233 W Brandon Blvd specializes in payday and title loans.
description_long:
Advance America operates at 233 W Brandon Blvd in Brandon, FL as a standalone storefront dedicated to serving the local community. The location maintains convenient hours Monday through Thursday from 10AM to 6PM, Friday from 9AM to 6PM, Saturday from 9AM to 4PM, and is closed on Sundays. This Brandon location provides quick access to essential cash solutions when you need them most.

This Brandon branch offers payday loans and title loans for borrowers seeking immediate funds. Contact the team at (813) 654-8293 to discuss your options and learn about loan amounts and terms. Whether facing unexpected expenses or planning short-term cash flow, the Advance America staff can walk you through the application process in person.

When you visit the Brandon Advance America storefront, bring a valid photo ID and proof of income to start your application. The approval process is designed for speed—most customers receive a decision the same day. In Brandon, FL, this location has become a trusted resource for residents needing payday or title loans without lengthy delays.

pricing.guarantee_details: No money-back guarantee found. Loan fees and terms are disclosed upfront per Federal Truth in Lending Act (TILA) requirements.

tiers.name: Payday Loans
features: Flat fee of approximately $15 per $100 borrowed
APR ranges from 143.29% to 688.28% depending on state and term
Repaid in full on next payday (typically 2–4 weeks)
In-store funding in approximately 15 minutes
Online funding within 24 hours
No strong credit score required

tiers.name: Installment Loans
features: Loan amounts from $100 to $5,000
Repaid in scheduled installment payments over time
Rates and terms vary by state
Available in-store and online
No strong credit history required

tiers.name: Title Loans
features: Loans up to $25,000 secured by vehicle title
Rates as low as 36% APR on loans over $5,000 (South Carolina)
Offered via LoanCenter partnership
Vehicle must be owned outright or have sufficient equity
Available at select locations

tiers.name: Lines of Credit
features: Revolving credit access — draw funds as needed up to limit
Rates and availability vary by state
Apply online or in-store
Reusable credit once repaid

certifications: State lending licenses in all operating states
Federal Truth in Lending Act (TILA) compliant

pros: 800+ physical storefronts across 27–29 states plus full online access — rare breadth for a non-bank lender
Extremely fast funding — approximately 15 minutes in-store and within 24 hours online
Over 157 million loans issued since 1997 — one of the largest non-bank cash advance companies in the U.S.
Trustpilot rating of 4.9/5 from over 100,000 reviews praising speed and in-store staff quality
BBB A+ rating with accreditation earned in 2024
Multiple product types under one brand — payday loans, installment loans, title loans, and lines of credit
Minimal credit requirements — accessible to borrowers with poor or limited credit history
cons: Payday loan APRs range from 143.29% to 688.28% — among the most expensive borrowing options legally available
BBB consumer review score of just 1.7/5 from 154 reviews, with recurring complaints about fees and billing practices
Product availability and loan terms vary significantly by state — not all products are offered in every location
Title loans use vehicle as collateral, creating genuine risk of repossession if the borrower defaults
Owned by Grupo Elektra, a foreign conglomerate — not a U.S.-based independent community lender
best_for: Consumers facing an urgent short-term cash gap between paychecks with no access to traditional bank credit
Borrowers with poor or no credit history who need same-day or next-day funding
People near an Advance America storefront who prefer in-person assistance applying for a loan
Those who can confidently repay the full balance on their next payday and avoid rollover fees
diagnosis: Advance America is a legitimate option of last resort for consumers who need fast cash and have exhausted lower-cost alternatives — its 800+ stores, 24-hour online funding, and minimal credit requirements make it genuinely accessible when traditional lenders won't help. The central caveat is cost: payday loan APRs can exceed 600%, and repeated rollovers can trap borrowers in a cycle of escalating debt that far exceeds the original principal. Anyone who can qualify for a credit union payday alternative loan (PAL), employer advance, or nonprofit emergency fund should exhaust those options first.
services: Payday Loans (small-dollar, repaid on next payday)
Installment Loans ($100–$5,000, repaid on a scheduled basis)
Title Loans (up to $25,000, vehicle-secured, via LoanCenter partnership)
Lines of Credit (revolving access to funds)
Check Cashing (available at select in-store locations)
In-store loan applications at 800+ U.S. locations
Loan account management via online portal

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Advance America, Cash Advance Centers, Inc.

meta_description: Brandon, FL Advance America at 233 W Brandon Blvd. Fast payday and title loans with same-day decisions.
